Create Cursor xTmpx (CMats c(14), Qtds n(12,3), Pesos n(12,3))
Index On CMats Tag CMats

Select xNensi
Set Order To 
Scan
	If Empty(CMats) Or (CMats = crSigCdPam.Ouros)
		Loop
	EndIf
	
	ThisForm.poDataMgr.CursorQuery('SigCdPro', 'LocalPro', 'CPros', xNensi.CMats, 'Varias')
	Select LocalPro
	If (LocalPro.Varias <> 1)
		Loop
	EndIf
	
	Select xTmpx
	If Not Seek(xNensi.CMats)
		Insert Into xTmpx (CMats) Values (xNensi.CMats)
	EndIf
	Replace Qtds  With Qtds  + xNensi.QtFaseAnt, ;
			Pesos With Pesos ... [TRUNCADO]
